q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is HttpResponse(body, content_type='text/html') which constructs an in-memory response object without network I/O or side effects

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Function returns the HttpResponse object containing the rendered body, allowing inspection of whether user input was escaped

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' with expr 'HttpResponse(body, content_type='text/html')', the rendered body is accessible via .content on the returned object
